pi_items.source: Extracted Adempiere_pg.dmp SQL seed file from the official idempiereofficial/idempiere:12-release Docker image and confirmed via grep that the c_elementvalue_id, account, and account_name values precisely match the database inserts. The descriptions, dr, and cr amounts are synthetic prompt instructions which match the verifier logic.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the iDempiere Postgres database is seeded with the exact required accounts (c_elementvalue_id 474 for 61100 Rent Expense, 749 for 21100 Accounts Payable Trade, 772 for 60110 Wages, and 602 for 22100 Accrued Payroll). The values strictly match the underlying SQL dump (Adempiere_pg.dmp) included in the official iDempiere Docker image. The task requirements for debit/credit amounts and descriptions match the verifier logic.
